macro.title: 29% of U.S. Homebuyers Paid Cash in March–the Lowest Share For That Month Since 2020
macro.what: With hundreds of thousands more home sellers than buyers in the market, fewer house hunters feel inclined to make cash offers to stand out in bidding wars
macro.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
macro.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

macro.title: Mortgage Rates Remain Tied to Iran War, Oil Prices
macro.what: This Week In A Nutshell: Three months in, the Iran war is still driving rates more than economic data
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: The Income Needed to Afford a Home Declined For Seventh Straight Month in April
macro.what: Homebuying affordability improved slightly in April because mortgage rates declined while incomes rose
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Exclusive: Xactus buys Mortgage Credit Link from MeridianLink

housing.title: Eastwood Homes lands Peachtree Building Group in Atlanta
housing.what: Eastwood Homes’ acquisition of Atlanta-based Peachtree Building Group – announced today – maps out on its surface as a straightforward expansion move

housing.title: CMLS, this one is for you: Build the alliance now or watch Compass build it instead

housing.title: Luxury Home Prices Rise Amid Uptick in High-End Homebuying and Selling
housing.what: The median luxury sale price is up 4% year over year—more than double the gain in non luxury prices
